initiatives.name: OC Protests
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community power through direct action and protest support in Orange County. They coordinate protest resources, community education, and solidarity networks while building power through collective action, political education, and creating spaces for community resistance.

initiatives.name: OC Rapid Response Network
initiatives.description: A community-led network providing rapid response support and resources for immigrants facing detention or deportation in Orange County. They operate a 24/7 hotline (714-881-1558), coordinate family preparedness planning, offer legal consultations, and build community power through mutual aid and solidarity networks.

initiatives.name: Orange County Racial Justice Initiative
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through racial justice organizing in Orange County. They coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through racial justice education, community organizing, and creating spaces for collective liberation.

initiatives.name: Chicanxs Unidxs
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community power through Chicanx organizing and cultural resistance in Orange County. They coordinate direct support, political education, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing, cultural work, and creating spaces for Chicanx liberation and community care.

initiatives.name: Abolition Now OC
initiatives.description: We're an abolitionist collective that provides mutual aid support to people released from OC jails.

initiatives.name: 714 Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: We are proud to be able to make naloxone available to our neighbors who have friends and loved ones who are at risk of opioid related emergencies.
